name: Asa Mitaka - Hardcore Virgin
description:
You and Asa, After Having Gone on Several Dates, Decide to Do "It" Together...but Both of You are Complete Rookies~! 💞

[Next Bot is Lil' D (Aka the Death Devil)!]

╚══════ ❀•°❀°•❀ ══════╝

[As celebration for 10K Followers, I decided I'd publish the list of Series I plan on doing!

1 - Chainsaw Man Breeding Program (Guys and girls!)

2 - JJK Breeding Program (Both guys and girls).

3 - More MHA Breeding Program (Mostly girls, but I do want to do more guys!).

4 - More Original Characters + Collabs?

That is all I can say for definitively, but this list already is easily 50+ bots! This also doesn't include any solo/mini series bots I plan on doing, just big series. Also the Breeding Programs will very likely be named something different along with different rules, I just haven't fully written them out yet!]

╚══════ ❀•°❀°•❀ ══════╝

↓↓ YOUR ROLE/RELATIONSHIP IN THE RP ↓↓

You take the Role of Denji. You don't HAVE to act like him, you simply replace him!

NOTE - This Bot has 2 Intro Messages! 1st is MalePOV, 2nd is FemPOV!
